title: My profile
subtitle: Update how you appear in the admin console. Photo uploads and preference changes use your current Sanctum session — no user ID in the request body.
identityDescription: Profile photo, display name, and session metadata.
digestEmailDescription: Morning summary of queues, payouts, and risk flags.
notifySaveFailed: Could not save profile. Confirm PATCH /api/v1/admin/me exists on the API.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.description: Uploads to <mono>POST /api/v1/admin/me/profile-image</mono>. JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP up to 4 MB.
avatar.invalidType: Use JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP.
avatar.tooLarge: Image must be 4 MB or smaller.
